parameters: There are luxury hotels all around Plana's palace, but we're nothing
I remember seeing the picture-story shows about demons when
I was a child. I always wanted to see a real one.
Today's the Saint Coliseum. If you want to go and watch,
take the road north from the crossroads.
Lately there have been demons sighted walking around town with
their big wings and long horns.
They're like something out of a storybook. Maybe I'll try talking to
one the next time I see them.
Only regular citizens and the wealthy are being targeted.
The ones who lived off the backs of slaves.
It feels like retaliation for all the sins we committed before.
It's two hundred iru a night. Would you like to rest?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
You don't have any money? Not even two hundred iru? I'll let you
stay a night for free. We need to look out for each other, after all.
